title: Flueggea jullienii
taxonomy: Flueggea jullienii is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It belongs to the genus Flueggea, which is a group of plants native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is also known as the Chinese croton, and its classification is based on its botanical characteristics and morphology. The species Flueggea jullienii is often found growing in humid and shaded areas, and it is valued for its ornamental and medicinal properties. Further classification of Flueggea jullienii can be refined using molecular phylogenetic analysis and other scientific methods.

The health benefits of Flueggea jullienii include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections.
